name: Tomato and Mozzarella Bruschetta
recipeIngredient: 2 Tablespoons balsamic vinegar or red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat broiler.
2. In a large bowl combine tomatoes, onion, capers, basil, and mozzarella.
3. Stir in balsamic vinegar or red wine vinegar and olive oil.
4. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Top toasted bread with the mixture and place on a baking sheet.
6. Broil until cheese melts.
7. Serve hot.
Alternative: Substitute 1 cup canned northern white beans for cheese and just top toasts with mixture.
Yield: 2-4 servings
